title: Finding the very best of Knysna & Plettenberg Bay
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The first ever Best of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The first ever Best of Knysna & Plett Readers' Choice Awards hosted by Knysna-Plett Herald is kicking off in May!","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The first ever Best of Knysna & Plett Readers' Choice Awards hosted by Knysna-Plett Herald is kicking off in May!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The aim of the awards is to identify and celebrate the very best that the Knysna and Plettenberg Bay business communities have to offer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Best of Knysna & Plett Awards follow after the raging success that the Best of George Awards experienced last year. So come on board and help us find and reward the most deserving businesses in our area.","html":"The Best of Knysna & Plett Awards follow after the raging success that the Best of George Awards experienced last year. So come on board and help us find and reward the most deserving businesses in our area."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From services, DIY and construction, to accommodation, restaurants, health and beauty and many more categories - the Best of Knysna & Plett Readers' Choice Awards powered by Knysna-Plett Herald is all about finding only the very best of what is locally on offer.","html":"From services, DIY and construction, to accommodation, restaurants, health and beauty and many more categories - the Best of Knysna & Plett Readers' Choice Awards powered by Knysna-Plett Herald is all about finding only the very best of what is locally on offer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"It is time for businesses in the region - from Sedgefield right through to Keurbooms - to shine, and you, our readers, are the expert judges!","html":"It is time for businesses in the region - from Sedgefield right through to Keurbooms - to shine, and you, our readers, are the expert judges!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"How it works"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nominations open on 1 May, and residents of the Plettenberg Bay and Knysna areas are asked to nominate their favourite businesses that excel in their chosen field in any of the categories.","html":"Nominations open on 1 May, and residents of the Plettenberg Bay and Knysna areas are asked to nominate their favourite businesses that excel in their chosen field in any of the categories."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These businesses go the extra mile to uphold the good name of our beautiful area, so let's reward them.","html":"These businesses go the extra mile to uphold the good name of our beautiful area, so let's reward them."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nomination and the voting process (when the time comes) are free, so be sure to nominate all of your favourites in the area to be in the running for a coveted Best of Knysna & Plett Readers' Choice Award.","html":"Nomination and the voting process (when the time comes) are free, so be sure to nominate all of your favourites in the area to be in the running for a coveted Best of Knysna & Plett Readers' Choice Award."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Help us to crown the best of the best, and you could be a winner too. Special prizes will be up for grabs for individuals who nominate and vote, so make sure your name is in the hat."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Keep an eye on the newspaper and the Knysna-Plett Herald Facebook page for regular updates about the awards.","html":"Keep an eye on the newspaper and the Knysna-Plett Herald Facebook page for regular updates about the awards."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Plettenberg Bay has become a sprawling seaside town with tourism generating the bulk of its income. Photo: Carlo Coetzee","html":"Plettenberg Bay has become a sprawling seaside town with tourism generating the bulk of its income. Photo: Carlo Coetzee"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
